record_or_cluster_title: Langflow custom_component endpoint allows public candidate record for remote code execution risk
current_state: medium confidence on T1_single_public_source single-source security candidate
recommended_publication_rule: Use low confidence in manuscript/dashboard text until an independent or vendor-confirming public source is attached.
issue_detail: Single-source CVE text is useful but does not justify medium-confidence comparative claims by itself.
required_move: Add vendor advisory/fix note or second independent public source; until then keep this in the security verification queue.
paper_thesis_use: Methods example showing why severity and CVE structure do not automatically justify stronger confidence labels.

record_or_cluster_title: AI now drafts completely absurd complaints; police lawyer frustrated: cases are cited that do not exist
current_state: medium confidence on multilingual title-gloss lead with unresolved direct source
recommended_publication_rule: Use low confidence and title-level wording only; do not promote to case-level factual or legal claims before direct-source retrieval and fuller translation.
issue_detail: Machine-translated title/gloss plus unresolved redirect caps the evidence ceiling even when the topic is paper-worthy.
required_move: Resolve direct source URL, extract bounded source_claim text, and assign stable case_id only after direct-source verification.
paper_thesis_use: Reviewer-visible limitations table for rare-language leads and translation-capped evidence.

current_state: Bare case_id string reused across distinct events in multiple shard files.
recommended_publication_rule: Do not compute duplicate counts, joins, or dashboard cluster totals on raw case_id; use file-qualified keys or a new global identifier namespace.
issue_detail: Do not merge. File-qualified IDs show distinct events; global case-id namespace is unsafe for downstream dedupe and dashboard joins until normalized.
required_move: Carry normalized record keys in every downstream table and reserve raw case_id for source-local provenance only until namespace repair is completed.
visualization_hook: duplicate-cluster graph warning; join-safety validator card
paper_thesis_use: Methods appendix and hostile-reviewer note on why apparent duplicates can be pure namespace collisions rather than event overlap.
